_comment: Reference shape for tests/_fakery_baseline.json. The real file is gitignored and generated on first run of tests/test_production_fakery_banned.py. The schema: violation entries are grouped by absolute file path; each entry lists the matching line number and the labelled pattern. Counts are per-pattern totals across the tree. Each new PR may only DECREASE the totals — when a baseline is shrunk in a PR, regenerate by deleting the real baseline and rerunning the test.
